assertions.description: lpf_filters.sch is a dedicated low-pass filter bank sub-sheet with 6 inductors (L1-L6) and 8 capacitors (C9-C16). The component count is correctly reported (total_components=14), but signal_analysis.lc_filters remains empty. This is a two-band LC ladder filter network for WSPR transmitter harmonic suppression. The detector does not recognize the LC ladder topology formed by series inductors with shunt capacitors to GND.
